title: Runeserver: Lite
description:
Maintaining the original vibe of Minecraft while adding mods that further enhance the user experience.

Has both client and serverside mods.
body:
This pack serves to keep the original Minecraft experience while adding in various mods that we believe will further enhance the experience for anyone.

The main stand-out mods here are Xaero's World and Minimaps, Roughly Enough Items and Veinminer, all customizable via Mod Menu.

We have also added several multiplayer specific mods such as Modflared that will allow you to connect to servers tunneled through Cloudflare, Simple Voice chat so that you do not have to use a third party chat software, Chat Heads and Chat Animation for a lite and clean feel should the need for text chat arise.

This pack also includes several optimisation mods such as Sodium and Lithium for better overall performance, with Iris Shaders included for ease of shader installation.

See below for the full list of currently added mods:

- Clumps (by Jaredlll08)
- Forge Config API Port (by Fuzs)
- ImmediatelyFast (by RaphiMC)
- Jade 🔍 (by Snownee)
- Mouse Tweaks (by YaLTeR)
- Puzzles Lib [Forge & Fabric] (by Fuzs)
- Roughly Enough Items Fabric/Forge/NeoForge (REI) (by shedaniel)
- Xaero's World Map (by xaero96)
- Xaero's Minimap (by xaero96)
- AppleSkin (by squeek502)
- Architectury API (by shedaniel, Juicebus, MaxNeedsSnacks)
- Balm (by BlayTheNinth)
- Chat Heads (by dzwdz)
- ChatAnimation (by ezzenix1)
- Cloth Config API (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge) (by shedaniel, LinkieIsBetterThanK9)
- Collective (by Serilum)
- Crafting Tweaks (by BlayTheNinth)
- Default Options (by BlayTheNinth)
- Entity Culling Fabric/Forge (by tr7zw)
- Fabric API (by modmuss50, sfPlayer1)
- Fabric Language Kotlin (by modmuss50, sfPlayer1)
- Freecam (by hashalite)
- Iris Shaders (by coderbot, IMS21)

- libIPN (by mirinimi)

- Text Placeholder API (by Patbox)

- Veinminer (by Miraculixx)
- Veinminer Hotkey (By Miraculixx)
